task_completion.description: Open the wildlife_species_audit project in QField.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QField application interface is visible with the wildlife_species_audit project loaded, showing the map view or project workspace.

task_completion.description: Access the feature attributes for the species_observations layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QField layer panel is open showing 'species_observations', or a feature identification/edit form is open displaying fields like species name, conservation_status, and priority_note.

task_completion.description: Update the conservation_status for Grus americana to EN and Bubo scandiacus to VU.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit form or attribute table in QField showing 'Grus americana' with 'EN' entered in the conservation_status field, and/or 'Bubo scandiacus' with 'VU' entered.

task_completion.description: Update the conservation_status for Charadrius melodus and Limosa fedoa to NT.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit form or attribute table in QField showing 'Charadrius melodus' and/or 'Limosa fedoa' with 'NT' entered in the conservation_status field.

task_completion.description: Add a monitoring justification to the priority_note field for species classified as NT, VU, or EN.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text entered in the 'priority_note' field within the QField edit form for any of the edited species (Grus americana, Bubo scandiacus, Charadrius melodus, or Limosa fedoa).

task_completion.description: Save the edits made to the species_observations features.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Tapping the checkmark or save button in the QField edit form to confirm feature modifications, or returning to the map view with changes applied.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the QField application interface to make edits.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the QField Android app UI being used to edit features, rather than a terminal emulator or SQLite command line interface.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered the statuses and notes in the app.
integrity.visual_evidence: On-screen keyboards are visible during text entry, or the agent is seen actively interacting with the QField feature form fields.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a Python script or external tool to modify the geopackage directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of Termux, Python IDEs, or file managers executing scripts to bypass the QField interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target layer is 'species_observations'. The expected conservation statuses to be updated are: Grus americana (EN), Bubo scandiacus (VU), Charadrius melodus (NT), and Limosa fedoa (NT). Note that Limosa fedoa MUST be classified as NT for this task, even if its real-world IUCN status differs. Any species marked NT, VU, or EN requires text in the 'priority_note' field.
